# endPoint

**Instance Property**

A point that identifies the end of the segment along the envelope.

## Declaration

```swift
var endPoint: simd_double2 { get set }
```

## Discussion

The framework connects this property to the prior segment’s end point, or the envelope [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEnvelope/startPoint], in the case of the first segment.

## Shaping a Segment

- **curveType**: A curve along the envelope that shapes the segment.
